title: holderType
description:
Controls the Holder Type of the data returned. By default, the service will return Institutional Holders. Requesting All Holders is not currently supported. Only a single Holder Type is allowed per request.
  * **F** = Institutions
  * **M** = Mutual Funds
  * **S** =  Insiders/Stakeholders
  * **FS** = Institutions/Insiders
  * **B** = Beneficial Owners
